evidence_summary: Can articulate what is and isn't in control but struggles to apply in the moment. Good post-hoc anal
Can rationally analyse the betrayal situation — 'addictions override decency, it was not personal' —
Practising critical thought with less cynicism. Beginning to hear both sides rather than just expose
Looking for opportunities to serve team with pride. Acknowledging when could have been nicer.
Acknowledging when could have been nicer. Seeking to catch injustice in the moment, not just reflect
Withheld verbal retaliation when called 'dear' incorrectly — chose restraint over habitual verbal cr
Fear of creative failure prevents action. Fear of work accident prevented attendance.
Can reframe difficulties as opportunities (degree led to career, hernia led to weight loss) but stil
Lists 18 things to change about self — honest self-examination including dark thoughts, temper, cyni
Resisted urge to break diet. Beginning to practice moderation.
Practising patience and curiosity as default responses. Keeping with diet rules.
Recognises overreaction patterns. Beginning to practice acceptance of imperfection.

causal_tendencies.description: The primary failure point is at assent — particularly assenting to the false judgement that external recognition (respect, acknowledgement, reputation) constitutes a genuine good. This pattern appears in 9 of 12 sections. Secondary breakdowns occur at horme (emotional impulse overriding deliberation, especially anger with children) and phantasia (catastrophizing, daydreaming horrible events).

specific_breakdowns.synkatathesis: Assents to false impressions about reputation, respect, self-worth. Treats preferred indifferents as genuine goods.
specific_breakdowns.horme: Anger impulse bypasses deliberation when children disobey or respect is perceived as absent.
specific_breakdowns.phantasia: Catastrophizing imagination generates false impressions of future disasters. Daydreaming horrible events.
specific_breakdowns.praxis: Avoidance behaviours (no tennis, no calling relatives, procrastination) — correct impressions but wrong actions.

value_hierarchy.primary_conflict: Reputation/validation treated as genuine good despite intellectual understanding that it is a preferred indifferent. Wife and self celebrate wealth/status as shared value system.
classification_gaps: Reputation → treated as genuine good (should be preferred indifferent)
Creative impact/recognition → treated as genuine good (the creation itself is virtuous, recognition is indifferent)
Others' respect → treated as genuine good (should be preferred indifferent)
Wealth/status achievements → celebrated as genuine goods, especially within marriage

self_preservation.evidence: Diet discipline, health awareness, journalling practice, mood checks

household.evidence: Wife, kids, parents all prominently featured. Strong duty to provide and connect. Parenting growth visible.

community.evidence: Boss, team, workmates featured. Beginning to extend to Seven Hills reserve. Work as service. Still searching for meaningful community contribution.

humanity.evidence: Environmental awareness, waste reduction, frugality with world resources. Not yet extended to active humanitarian concern.

cosmic.evidence: Nature appreciation deepening. 'If everything belongs to nature then so do I.' Beginning to see place in larger rational order.

proximity_estimate.description: Clinton is between habitual and deliberate, trending firmly toward deliberate by journal's end. He can articulate Stoic principles accurately, identifies his own passions and false judgements, and shows genuine developmental change across the journal's 55+ day arc. The gap is between intellectual understanding and dispositional stability — he knows the right answer but doesn't yet reliably apply it under pressure. Key evidence of progress: anger with children reduced and replaced with encouragement, cynicism identified as 'protection blanket' to release, comprehensive bias awareness, contentment formula articulated, self-forgiveness begun.
